allow: Bash(node -e "import app from 'file:///C:/Users/TK/Desktop/DoAn3/backend/src/app.js'; const server = app.listen\(0, async \(\) => { const { port } = server.address\(\); const base = 'http://127.0.0.1:' + port; const checks = [ ['/api/health', {}], ['/api/health/live', {}], ['/api/health/ready', {}], ['/api/metrics', { headers: { 'x-metrics-token': '' } }], ['/api/admin/blogs/audit-logs', {}] ]; for \(const [path, options] of checks\) { const response = await fetch\(base + path, options\); const body = await response.text\(\); console.log\(path + ' -> ' + response.status + ' ' + body.slice\(0, 220\)\); } server.close\(\); }\);")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e 'import { prisma } from "file:///C:/Users/TK/Desktop/DoAn3/backend/src/db/prisma.js"; import { createAdminAuditLog, listAdminAuditLogs } from "file:///C:/Users/TK/Desktop/DoAn3/backend/src/services/admin-audit.service.js"; const run = async \(\) => { const admin = await prisma.user.findFirst\({ where: { role: "ADMIN" }, select: { id: true, email: true } }\); if \(!admin\) { console.log\("NO_ADMIN_USER"\); await prisma.$disconnect\(\); return; } const targetId = "smoke-audit-" + Date.now\(\); await createAdminAuditLog\({ actorUserId: admin.id, action: "UPDATE_POST_STATUS", targetType: "BLOG_POST", targetId, metadata: { smoke: true } }\); const result = await listAdminAuditLogs\({ targetId, limit: 5 }\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({ adminEmail: admin.email, count: result.logs.length, first: result.logs[0] ?? null }, null, 2\)\); await prisma.$executeRaw`DELETE FROM nhat_ky_quan_tri WHERE doi_tuong_id = ${targetId}`; await prisma.$disconnect\(\); }; run\(\).catch\(async \(error\) => { console.error\(error\); try { await prisma.$disconnect\(\); } catch {} process.exit\(1\); }\);')

Bash(node --input-type=module -e 'import app from "file:///C:/Users/TK/Desktop/DoAn3/backend/src/app.js"; import { prisma } from "file:///C:/Users/TK/Desktop/DoAn3/backend/src/db/prisma.js"; import { signAccessToken } from "file:///C:/Users/TK/Desktop/DoAn3/backend/src/utils/tokens.js"; const run = async \(\) => { const admin = await prisma.user.findFirst\({ where: { role: "ADMIN", status: "ACTIVE" }, select: { id: true, email: true, role: true } }\); if \(!admin\) { console.log\("NO_ADMIN_USER"\); await prisma.$disconnect\(\); return; } const token = signAccessToken\({ sub: admin.id.toString\(\), role: admin.role }\); const server = app.listen\(0, async \(\) => { const { port } = server.address\(\); const response = await fetch\(`http://127.0.0.1:${port}/api/admin/blogs/audit-logs?page=1&limit=5`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } }\); const body = await response.text\(\); console.log\("STATUS", response.status\); console.log\(body.slice\(0, 400\)\); server.close\(async \(\) => { await prisma.$disconnect\(\); }\); }\); }; run\(\).catch\(async \(error\) => { console.error\(error\); try { await prisma.$disconnect\(\); } catch {} process.exit\(1\); }\);')

Bash(node --input-type=module -e 'import { prisma } from "file:///C:/Users/TK/Desktop/DoAn3/backend/src/db/prisma.js"; import { createBlogPost, updateBlogPost, updateBlogPostStatus, publishBlogPost, scheduleBlogPost, softDeleteBlogPost, restoreBlogPost } from "file:///C:/Users/TK/Desktop/DoAn3/backend/src/services/blog-post.service.js"; import { createComment, moderateComment, deleteComment } from "file:///C:/Users/TK/Desktop/DoAn3/backend/src/services/blog-comment.service.js"; import { listAdminAuditLogs } from "file:///C:/Users/TK/Desktop/DoAn3/backend/src/services/admin-audit.service.js"; const run = async \(\) => { const admin = await prisma.user.findFirst\({ where: { role: "ADMIN", status: "ACTIVE" }, select: { id: true, email: true } }\); if \(!admin\) throw new Error\("NO_ADMIN_USER"\); const now = Date.now\(\); const created = await createBlogPost\({ authorId: admin.id, title: "Smoke Audit " + now, content: "x".repeat\(80\), status: "PUBLISHED" }\); const postId = created.id; const postRecord = await prisma.blogPost.findUnique\({ where: { id: BigInt\(postId\) }, select: { slug: true } }\); await updateBlogPost\({ id: postId, actorId: admin.id, excerpt: "Smoke excerpt updated" }\); const comment = await createComment\({ slug: postRecord.slug, userId: null, guestName: "Smoke Guest", content: "Noi dung comment smoke hop le" }\); await moderateComment\({ id: comment.id, actorId: admin.id, status: "HIDDEN" }\); await deleteComment\({ id: comment.id, actorId: admin.id }\); await updateBlogPostStatus\({ id: postId, actorId: admin.id, status: "DRAFT" }\); await softDeleteBlogPost\({ id: postId, actorId: admin.id }\); await restoreBlogPost\({ id: postId, actorId: admin.id }\); const future = new Date\(Date.now\(\) + 86400000\).toISOString\(\); await scheduleBlogPost\({ id: postId, actorId: admin.id, scheduledAt: future }\); await publishBlogPost\({ id: postId, actorId: admin.id }\); const postLogs = await listAdminAuditLogs\({ targetId: String\(postId\), limit: 20 }\); const commentLogs = await listAdminAuditLogs\({ targetId: String\(comment.id\), limit: 20 }\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({ postActions: postLogs.logs.map\(\(log\) => log.action\), commentActions: commentLogs.logs.map\(\(log\) => log.action\) }, null, 2\)\); await prisma.$executeRaw`DELETE FROM nhat_ky_quan_tri WHERE doi_tuong_id IN \(${String\(postId\)}, ${String\(comment.id\)}\)`; await prisma.blogComment.deleteMany\({ where: { id: BigInt\(comment.id\) } }\); await prisma.blogPost.deleteMany\({ where: { id: BigInt\(postId\) } }\); await prisma.$disconnect\(\); }; run\(\).catch\(async \(error\) => { console.error\(error\); try { await prisma.$disconnect\(\); } catch {} process.exit\(1\); }\);')

Bash(node --input-type=module -e 'import app from "file:///C:/Users/TK/Desktop/DoAn3/backend/src/app.js"; import { prisma } from "file:///C:/Users/TK/Desktop/DoAn3/backend/src/db/prisma.js"; import { generateAccessToken } from "file:///C:/Users/TK/Desktop/DoAn3/backend/src/utils/tokens.js"; const run = async \(\) => { const admin = await prisma.user.findFirst\({ where: { role: "ADMIN", status: "ACTIVE" } }\); if \(!admin\) throw new Error\("NO_ADMIN_USER"\); const token = generateAccessToken\(admin\); const server = app.listen\(0\); await new Promise\(\(resolve\) => server.once\("listening", resolve\)\); const port = server.address\(\).port; const response = await fetch\("http://127.0.0.1:" + port + "/api/admin/blogs/audit-logs?page=1&limit=5", { headers: { Authorization: "Bearer " + token } }\); const body = await response.text\(\); console.log\("STATUS", response.status\); console.log\(body.slice\(0, 400\)\); await new Promise\(\(resolve\) => server.close\(resolve\)\); await prisma.$disconnect\(\); }; run\(\).catch\(async \(error\) => { console.error\(error\); try { await prisma.$disconnect\(\); } catch {} process.exit\(1\); }\);')
